title: Chunk Challenge
description: Every chunk is a challenge. A glowing mob blocks your path until defeated, with per-player borders and progressive rewards.
body:
## Chunk Challenge

**Chunk Challenge** is a Fabric mod that turns Minecraft into a progressive survival challenge — one chunk at a time.

Every time you enter a new chunk, the world transforms around you: a randomized mob appears, a personal border locks you in, and **all blocks in the chunk are replaced with one randomly selected block type**. Clear the challenge, earn reward chests, and move on.

Inspired by popular challenge formats, built for chaotic runs and long-term progression.

---

## How It Works

When the challenge is active, entering a new chunk triggers:

- **Per-player WorldBorder** that locks you inside the current chunk  
- **Random mob spawn** inside the chunk  
- **Chunk block replacement:** every block in the chunk becomes the **same random block**  
- Optional loot rewards for clearing chunks (with milestones)  

Progress is tracked per player and saved per world.

---

## Features

✔ Per-player world borders  
✔ Random mobs per chunk  
✔ **Chunk-wide block randomization (one random block per chunk)**  
✔ Progressive difficulty scaling  
✔ Optional reward chests + milestone rewards  
✔ Multiple difficulty modes incl. **TRUE_RANDOM**  
✔ Admin/debug commands for testing  
✔ Multiplayer + server-side compatible  

---

## Difficulty Modes

| Mode | Description |
|------|-------------|
| EASY | Forgiving progression |
| NORMAL | Balanced default experience |
| HARD | High-risk, high-reward challenge |
| TRUE_RANDOM | Every mob has equal chance — pure chaos |

---

## Commands

Requires operator permission.

/chunkchallenge start [easy|normal|hard|true_random] [loot|noloot]
/chunkchallenge stop
/chunkchallenge status
/chunkchallenge admin ...


Use `/chunkchallenge help` for full command info.

## Compatibility

- Minecraft: **1.21.11**  
- Loader: Fabric  
- Multiplayer: ✔ Supported  
- Server-side: ✔ Works without client mod  

---

## Feedback & Support

Bug reports and suggestions are welcome.

---
